metaDescription: Qwen2.5-Max (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2025-01-29 — part of the Qwen-Max line. Large-scale MoE proprietary flagship of the 2.5 generation, available via API an…
overview: Qwen2.5-Max is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-Max line. Released 2025-01-29. Alibaba's proprietary, API-only flagship — its largest and most capable text/reasoning model, accessible through Alibaba Cloud Model Studio.
What's notable in this version: Large-scale MoE proprietary flagship of the 2.5 generation, available via API and Qwen Chat.
